title: Love Marriage
subTitle: A commitment-shy lawyer expects his lover to wait around for him forever.

title: Gangstar King
subTitle: Prem, a dreaded gangster, uses a simple call centre employee's guise to live with a family as a paying guest. However, his housemates are unaware of his evil motives.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: The demons discover that Goddess Parvati is in the temple of Goddess Kamakhya and proceed to disrespect Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati as Shumbh is determined to marry Parvati.

title: Master Moshai
subTitle: Master Moshai

title: Raj Mahal
subTitle: Ratan, on the run from the law, murders a wealthy landowner's son. He then schemes to take over the landlord's vast estate illegally.

title: Badsha the King
subTitle: Badsha, a young man, saves Titli, a wealthy heiress, on multiple occasions. However, things become complicated when the duo falls in love.

title: Baro Bou
subTitle: Tapan and his wife generously provide for their joint family. However, when the younger brother marries his employer's daughter, he becomes arrogant, which creates a rift within the family.

title: Prem Amar
subTitle: A young man falls in love with his new neighbour. However, his life takes a turn for the worse when he learns that she is betrothed to another man.

title: I Love You
subTitle: A rich boy loves a poor village girl, but when his family insults her, he chooses to leave his wealthy life and move to her simple village to prove his love.

title: Badsha: The Don
subTitle: A man who aspires to become a gangster arrives in London to achieve his dreams. However, complications arise when he meets a woman and falls in love with her.

title: Badsha: The Don
subTitle: A man who aspires to become a gangster arrives in London to achieve his dreams. However, complications arise when he meets a woman and falls in love with her.

title: Chopper
subTitle: America had Al Capone; England, the Kray brothers and Australia - proving once and for all its antipodean sense of humor - has Mark "Chopper" Read. "Chopper" is inspired by the books of Mark Brandon "Chopper" Read, arguably Australia's most infamous former criminal. "Chopper" draws on police records, court transcripts, news coverage and interviews with people who knew Chopper Read.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: Shumbh is taken aback after Goddess Parvati manages to complete the ritual before sunrise. Subsequently, a fierce battle ensues, which leads to Nishumbh's demise.

title: Premer Pratidan
subTitle: Besotted with Radha, Sandip journeys to Shimla to profess his love. Though he eventually wins her heart, their newfound happiness proves fleeting.

title: Debota
subTitle: After getting subjected to injustice since childhood, Rana decides to rob the rich and distribute the wealth amongst the poor. However, things get difficult when he gets accused of killing his lover.

title: Dada Thakur
subTitle: Gita plans to reunite with her long-estranged father, not knowing that he is waiting for her younger sister, Mita, to return. The two siblings then struggle to win back his trust.

title: Minister Phatakesto
subTitle: Fatakeshto, an MLA turned home minister, vows to rescue the government from a massive financial loss while political thugs create several hurdles for him.

title: Surya
subTitle: Ashok, a businessman, provides shelter to Mahim Halden who kills and takes over his property. Soon, Ashok's son, Surya, sets out to avenge his father's death.

title: Barood
subTitle: When an honest police officer is framed by a corrupt politician for his benefit, he fights to prove his innocence.

title: Greftaar
subTitle: Arun Roy, a police sub-inspector, comes face-to-face with a corrupt political leader, Indrajit, and stands up to him. As a result, his father is humiliated and suspended from the police.

title: Greftaar
subTitle: Arun Roy, a police sub-inspector, comes face-to-face with a corrupt political leader, Indrajit, and stands up to him. As a result, his father is humiliated and suspended from the police.

title: Satyanweshi
subTitle: In a princely state, detective Byomkesh solves a mystery, attempts to solve a mystery, uncovering secrets of an enigmatic royal household.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: With a ferocious lion under her control, Goddess Parvati transforms into a new avatar and embarks on a quest to annihilate Shumbh.

title: Yugabatar Lokenath
subTitle: The wealthy Dutta family's priest narrates the miracles and teachings of Baba Lokenath Brahmachari and stresses the importance of harmony in order to make way for reconciliation.

title: Prem Shakti
subTitle: Ganga and Gauri anger an evil tantric by saving Nagaraj. Enraged, the tantric turns Gauri into stone and kills Ganga. Nagaraj blesses Ganga with rebirth and helps unite him with his love.

title: Naach Nagini Naach Re
subTitle: Twins Hansi and Khushi are separated at birth when the latter is stolen by a snake charmer. Years later, Inspector Shubho hatches a plan to unite them.

title: Paran Jai Jaliya Re
subTitle: Paran Jai Jaliya Re

title: Chandra Mallika
subTitle: A man defies his wealthy father and marries a woman from a simple background. However, his father is determined to break up the relationship.

title: Bidroho
subTitle: Uttam's ailing mother dies after not getting proper treatment when the landlord refuses to help them. Later, he decides to exact revenge against the injustice done to him.

title: Ranakshetra
subTitle: When Santu protests against availability of drugs and gets murdered by a minister's son, his brother, Raja decides to seek justice on his own after his legal efforts go in vain.
